proof: function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { Int.from_nat(abs(x0).gcd(abs(x1))) = x0.gcd(x1) }(ai, bi)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Int) { exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { k0 * x0 + k1 * x1 = x2 } = spans(x0, x1, x2) }(Int.from_nat(a), Int.from_nat(b), Int.from_nat(a.gcd(b)))
exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { Int.from_nat(a.gcd(b)) = k0 * Int.from_nat(a) + k1 * Int.from_nat(b) } = spans(Int.from_nat(a), Int.from_nat(b), Int.from_nat(a.gcd(b)))
